Exact translation of tamil words
Kaal Mulaitha Poove
ennodu pele aada va va!
Volga nadhi polae nillaamal
kadhal paada va va!

Chamomile poovin vaasam adhai
un idhalil kandaene
Soviet oviyak kavithaigalai
un vizhyin vilimbinil kandaen!

Asaiyum asaivil manadhai pisaya hey hey
idhaya idukkil mazhayai pozhiya hey hey
Uyirai urasi analai aluppa hey hey
aeriyum veriyai therithaai

Nilavugal thalaigal kunindhadhe
malarkalin mamadhai alindhadhe
kadavulin kadamai mudindhadhe
azhagi ne pirandha nodiyile!

Hey penne, un valaivugalil
tholaivadhu pole unarugiren
idayinile thinarugiren
kanavidhudhaana? vinavugiren!

Asaiyum asaivil manadhai pisaya hey hey
idhaya idukkil mazhayai pozhiya hey hey
Uyirai urasi analai aluppa hey hey
aeriyum veriyai therithaai

Iravellam Nilavu aerigayil
thirigalai viralgal theriyudhey!
Arugile nerungi varugayil
ilagiye olukkam urugudhe!

Nilavu aerigayil viralgal theriyudho ?
nerungi varugayil olukkam urugudho ?

ennai aeno, urukkugiraai
nerupinnai nenjil irakkukiraai
idaiveliyai surukukiraai
irakkam indri, irukkukiraai

Asaiyum asaivil manadhai pisaya hey hey
idhaya idukkil mazhayai pozhiya hey hey

aeriyum veriyai therithaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaal Mulaitha Poove?

The song is a romantic melody that expresses deep emotions and love.

Who are the singers of this song?

Javed Ali and Mahalakshmi have lent their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Maattrraan?

The music for the movie was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

What is the release year of the movie Maattrraan?

The movie was released in the year 2012.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song enhances the romantic narrative and adds depth to the characters' relationship.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kaal Mulaitha Poove is a romantic melody from the movie Maattrraan, capturing the tender emotions between the lead characters. Sung by Javed Ali and Mahalakshmi, the song's soothing music by Harrish Jeyaraj complements the heartfelt lyrics by Karky. It beautifully conveys the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The song's gentle rhythm and poetic lyrics evoke a sense of warmth and affection, enhancing the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kaal Mulaitha Poove from the movie Maattrraan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the soulful voices of Javed Ali and Mahalakshmi, combined with Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting music, this song is a perfect blend of melody and emotion. Dive into the lyrical magic penned by Karky and experience a musical journey like no other.
stanzaMeanings: Come, flower that bloomed in the morning, come dance with me! Like the Volga river, come sing love without stopping!
I found the scent of chamomile flowers on your lips. I saw Soviet paintings and poems in the corners of your eyes.
With desire and movement, you tease the heart, hey hey. In the embrace of the heart, you pour rain, hey hey. You warm the soul and tire the fire, hey hey. You revealed the burning passion.
The moonlight bowed its head, the pride of flowers faded. God's duty ended the moment you were born, beautiful one!
Did the heads bow? Did the pride fade? Did the duty end? The moment you were born?
Hey girl, I feel like getting lost in your curves. I am melting inside, is this a dream? I am asking!
With desire and movement, you tease the heart, hey hey. In the embrace of the heart, you pour rain, hey hey. You warm the soul and tire the fire, hey hey. You revealed the burning passion.
All night, the moon is in the sky, fingers are visible in the waves. As you come closer, my discipline melts away!
Are fingers visible in the moonlit waves? As you come closer, does discipline melt away?
For some reason, you melt me, you bring the fire into my heart. You shrink the distance, you stay without mercy.
With desire and movement, you tease the heart, hey hey. In the embrace of the heart, you pour rain, hey hey. You warm the soul and tire the fire, hey hey. You revealed the burning passion.
